titleStmt.title: SII 18.302: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 302. (B.K. No. 91 of 1933-34.) HONNATTI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Pillar in the temple of Rāmaliṅga.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the rule of Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Jōyidēva and is dated in Plavaṁga Kārtika Śu. Pūrṇima, Monday. The Śaka year is not given; but the details work out regularly to A.D. 1187, October 19, Monday, in the year Plavaṁga corresponding to Śaka 1109.

It states that Sarvapradhāva Tipparasa constructed the temple of Rājēśvara in the premises of the Chāmēśvara temple of Honnavatti at the instance of Sarvādhikāri Bīchiseṭṭi, (who made certain gifts to that temple). It also registers grants of lands, house-site and certain incomes, made by Hiriya Jōyidēva, Bīchiseṭṭi, Tipparasa and other residents of Honnavatti (Modern Honnatti).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgaśirastuṁgacaṁdracāmara
śaṁbhavē trailōkyanagarāru(raṁ)bhamūlastaṁ
baya saṁbhavē . śvasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrī
mammāha pradhānaṁ sarvvādhikāri bīciseṭiyaMistake for manmahā.
ra hēḷikeyiṁ sarvvapradhāna tipparasaru honavati
ya cāmēśvaradēvara samīpadalu rājēśvaradē
vara pratiṣṭeya māḍidanu dēvarige staḷavriti bē
keṁdu nāḍige saṁtānahonavati gauḍaṁdu kāva (?)
ṇike Uḍugaṟe koṭu kaḷihidaru bīciseṭiya
ru . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanumāMistake for manmahā.
hamaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ caṁdraguptānvaya guta
kulakamaḷamārtthaṁḍa kadanapracaṁḍa hanibara
gaṁḍa maṁ bhairava saraṇagatavajrapaṁjara śrīpaThis may be a short form of maṁḍaḷika
ruśaliṁga gaḷaganāthadēvara dibyaśrīpādapa
dumārādhakarumapa jōyidēvarasaru
plevaṁgasauvatsarada kārtthika sudha pavurṇna
mi sōmavāra vitipātadalu rājē
svaradēvara Ācāryya virūpākṣadēva triḷōca
nadēvara kālaṁ toḷadu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ maRead mā
ḍi koṭaru honavatiya mūḍaṇa teṁka
ṇa kīrttināraṇadēvara keyiṁ mūḍalu
baḍagaṇa sīme kaṁmāṟakeyiṁ teṁkal
mūḍalu siṁdanahaḷiya holavēreyiṁ
teṁka bāgudoṇeyiṁ baḍagalu koṭa
hiriya jōyidēva bīciseṭi tiparasaru
honavatiya bhāskaradēva bēḷiseṭi sāvi
seṭi muṁthāda samasta prajegaḷu yidu
rājēśvaradēvarige koṭa vriti gaṁgana ma
talu nāku maneya gadeyiṁ paḍuva
lu gade kaṁba 12 baḍagaṇa hebāgilu
rājabīdiyiṁ paḍuvalu 16 gāṇada
mane 1 mūḍaṇa nuguteyalali yipa
tu kayi mane 1 dēvagoḷaga kaliseṭi muṁ
muridaṁḍa mukhyavāgi koṭa saṁte
ya Āyava koṭaru rājēśvaradēvarige hi
riya jōyidēvarasaru koṭa vriti ©
Digital edition of SII 18.302 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
